---
title: "Module 1 Introduction to Literate Programming with Quarto.qmd"
author: "Claudia Flores"
date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    number-sections: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-fold: false
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
    df-print: paged
editor: visual
execute: 
  freeze: auto
  warning: false
---

# Hello!

**This is bold**

`This is code`

*Something else*

## My name is!

### Claudia

- Item 1

- Item 2

- Item 3

1.  List 1

2.  [List 2](google.com)

    ![](https://www.cpp.edu/cba/customer-insights-lab/img/home/ccidm-logo-green-on-white-cropped-text.png)

::: callout-tip
Hello!
:::

# 

> How are you

| Col1 | Col2 | Col3 |
|------|------|------|
| 1    | 2    | 3    |
| 4    | 5    | 6    |
| 7    | 8    | 9    |

: this is a table

@tbl-example

```{r}
#| echo: false
plot(cars)
```
